title: Run next-forge deps + Playwright E2E suite (API /health)
description: Steps: 1) cd next-forge (in Monorepo_ModMe-dev/dev worktree) 2) yarn install (respect workspace manager rules) 3) start servers: yarn dev:forge:core (or whatever your workflow uses) 4) run: yarn playwright test tests/e2e/api-health.spec.ts 5) confirm it hits http://localhost:3102/health -> 200 OK.\nGate: Failures likely indicate API can't boot (tsconfig/build) or port mismatch.

title: Verify e2e suite with API /health smoke
description: Before closing: start next-forge dev:forge:core (ensures ports 3100-3104 + api 3102), then run Playwright in next-forge with: yarn playwright test tests/e2e/api-health.spec.ts (or equivalent).\nExpected: test passes (status 200, body OK).\nIf fails: capture server logs; likely tsconfig/build problem or port mismatch.

title: Add Playwright E2E: API /health smoke (catches next-forge tsconfig boot breaks)
description: Add Playwright spec under next-forge/tests/e2e/ that calls GET http://localhost:3102/health and asserts 200 + OK.\nTDD: Red phase not required (route already exists), but test should fail if API can't boot/compile due to tsconfig extends break.\nScope: keep it minimal and fast so CI remains stable.
notes:
Verification note: dev worktree lacks next-forge 
ode_modules, so 
px playwright fails with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for @playwright/test. After installing next-forge deps, rerun yarn playwright test tests/e2e/api-health.spec.ts or yarn dev:forge:core + Playwright.

title: Fix tsconfig extends path for next-forge apps/api
description: Why: TypeScript in Monorepo_ModMe-dev couldn't read nextjs.json at ../../typescript-config/nextjs.json.\nWhat: Updated apps/api/tsconfig.json extends to ../../packages/typescript-config/nextjs.json and set ignoreDeprecations=" 6.0\
notes: Follow-up: removed compilerOptions.baseUrl and ignoreDeprecations to avoid TS5101 baseUrl deprecation conflicts with editor tsconfig schema. Shared config extends path is still updated to ../../packages/typescript-config/nextjs.json.
close_reason: extends path fixed; baseUrl removed to avoid TS5101; e2e tasks remain separate
